name: telegram-bot-app
description: Telegram bot with weather, scraper and webhook integrations

scripts.start: node scripts/patch-pinball-webhook.mjs && node scripts/patch-pinball-actions.mjs && node scripts/patch-pinball-totals.mjs && node scripts/patch-command-input-flow.mjs && node scripts/patch-telegram-recipients.mjs && node scripts/patch-dokploy-webhook.mjs && node scripts/patch-check-customer.mjs && node index.js
scripts.dev: node scripts/patch-pinball-webhook.mjs && node scripts/patch-pinball-actions.mjs && node scripts/patch-pinball-totals.mjs && node scripts/patch-command-input-flow.mjs && node scripts/patch-telegram-recipients.mjs && node scripts/patch-dokploy-webhook.mjs && node scripts/patch-check-customer.mjs && node --watch index.js
